title: So did Shinji ever take care of Kajis watermelons
display_title: So did Shinji ever take care of Kajis watermelons
wikitext:
[]: So ... did Shinji ever take care of Kaji's watermelons?             Quote Post by Dataprime » Wed Apr 30, 2014 12:31 pm Kaji specifically asked that he wanted Shinji to look after them. It was only ever mentioned once, then never again addressed. What do you all think? Personally I think he forgot about them. Actually ... he did leave the message on Misato's answering machine so we can probably blame her for not telling Shinji Poor melons they just withered away and died :(

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Apr 30, 2014 1:02 pm Well, third impact came around a few weeks later. I don't think those melons would have been fine anyway. Maybe he was asking him to take care of Misato's melons.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Apr 30, 2014 1:24 pm Pretty sure they died during the month or so he spent inside Eva-01...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Apr 30, 2014 1:52 pm Kaji was still doing the watering during Shinji's time out.

[]: Re: So ... did Shinji ever take care of Kaji's watermelons?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Apr 30, 2014 3:50 pm Dataprime wrote: Kaji specifically asked that he wanted Shinji to look after them.

[]: Re: So ... did Shinji ever take care of Kaji's watermelons?             Quote Post by Dataprime » Wed Apr 30, 2014 6:37 pm Kendrix wrote: Actually, he asked Misato to do it

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Apr 30, 2014 6:50 pm He asks Misato, and tells her that Shinji knows where they are.

[]: Re: So ... did Shinji ever take care of Kaji's watermelons?             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Apr 30, 2014 6:57 pm Kendrix wrote: (Bad, bad Q, showing us Kaworu standing around thinking amids the ruined fields/twisted water sprout... The melons did fare better in ANIMA, tho, where Shinji does adopt them... The good news is, if you think Kaji will be back after EoE, so will the melons.)

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Wed Apr 30, 2014 7:55 pm He can always fertilize Misato's melon patch like he did that one time.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Apr 30, 2014 8:08 pm If the melons come back after Instrumentality they'd have to come back somewhere else. The place where they were blew up. Right? I think? Where the hell did the black moon go? I'm seriously blanking out here. Did GNR absorb it?

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Wed Apr 30, 2014 8:22 pm Guy Nacks wrote: He can always fertilize Misato's melon patch like he did that one time.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Wed Apr 30, 2014 8:27 pm ChaddyManPrime wrote: My joke was a lot dirtier than that but I didn't get to write it cause someone said that Shinji wasn't meant to water the melons

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Wed Apr 30, 2014 8:30 pm Guy Nacks wrote: That's right, he was meant to water the flowers. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Wed Apr 30, 2014 8:36 pm Let me clarify: He should have watered her flower.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Apr 30, 2014 8:43 pm I thought Kaji was alluding to Shinji giving Misato his grandmother's prize necklace, which he had entrusted to the boy for safekeeping.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Wed Apr 30, 2014 8:45 pm Pearls are valuable things, he's gotta pass them on to somebody.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Wed Apr 30, 2014 8:54 pm Chuckman wrote: I thought Kaji was alluding to Shinji giving Misato his grandmother's prize necklace, which he had entrusted to the boy for safekeeping.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Apr 30, 2014 9:38 pm Guy Nacks wrote: Let me clarify: He should have watered her flower.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Apr 30, 2014 9:45 pm Guy Nacks wrote: Let me clarify: He should have watered her flower.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Wed Apr 30, 2014 9:46 pm Kendrix wrote: ...at least he was a graceful loser about being weeded out by evolution...
summary: []: So ... did Shinji ever take care of Kaji's watermelons?             Quote Post by Dataprime » Wed Apr 30, 2014 12:31 pm Kaji specifically asked that he wanted Shinji to look after them. It was only ever mentioned once, then never again addressed. What do you all think? Personally I think he forgot about them. Actually ... he did leave the message on Misato's answering machine so we can probably blame her for not telling Shinji Poor
